<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get current convention"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/conventions/current"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the next upcoming or currently running convention
(the earliest convention whose `end_date` is today or later).

This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  {...require("./get-current-convention.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  {...require("./get-current-convention.StatusCodes.json")}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
